data.name: after_g3_ip_1
data.description: Extract the answer to question 1 on page 1, which is one of the selected options.

data.name: after_g3_ip_2
data.description: Extract the handwritten answer to question 2 on page 1.

data.name: after_g3_ip_3
data.description: Extract the answer to question 3 on page 1, which is one of the selected options.  There can be multiple answers.

data.name: after_g3_ip_4
data.description: Extract the answer to question 4 on page 1, which is one of the selected options.  There can be multiple answers.

data.name: after_g3_ip_5
data.description: Extract the handwritten answer to question 5 on page 1.

data.name: after_g3_cr_1
data.description: extract answer to question 1 to change the rationale on page 5. The answer is one of the selected options

data.name: after_g3_cr_2
data.description: Extract the answer to question 2 on page 5, which is an integer.

data.name: after_g3_cr_3
data.description: Extract the answer to question 3 on page 5, which is one of the selected options.  There can be multiple answers.

data.name: after_g3_cr_4
data.description: Extract the handwritten answer to question 3 on page 5, which is the third question on this page.

data.name: after_g3_cr_5
data.description: Extract the handwritten answer to question 4 on page 6. this the first question on the page.

data.name: after_g3_cr_6
data.description: Extract the answer to question 5 on page 6, which is one of the selected options. This is the second question on the page.

data.name: after_g3_goal
data.description: Extract the handwritten goal of the system on page 2.

data.name: after_g3_input
data.description: Extract the handwritten input of the system on page 2.

data.name: after_g3_output
data.description: Extract the handwritten output of the system on page 2.

data.name: after_g3_fr
data.description: Extract a list of up to 10 handwritten functional requirements on page 3

data.name: after_g3_constraints
data.description: Extract a list of 6 handwritten constraints on page 3.

data.name: afterg3_invariants
data.description: Extract a list of up to 3 handwritten invariants on page 4.

data.name: after_g3_neg
data.description: Extract a list of up to 2 handwritten negative requirements on page 4.

data.name: after_g3_tb
data.description: Extract the handwritten tie-breaking rule response on page 4.

data.name: after_g3_exception
data.description: Extract the handwritten exception response on page 4.
